examples: Objective: to probe into the relationship of hemorheology, the changes of apoprotein and the coronary heart disease.
Objective to prepare a kit for detecting apoprotein (apo) A1 and B. Methods Dextran sulfate precipitation, ultracentrifugation, chromatography, and so on.
SAA is a kind of apoprotein, it can inhibiting HDL's RCT function, and through this way increase serum cholesterol level and increase cholesterol deposit to as site.
